message:
fix(convoy): capture bd stderr and suppress usage dump on errors (#2270)

When bd subprocess calls failed, gt convoy list showed a bare "exit status 1"
with no diagnostic info, plus cobra dumped usage help making it look like a
syntax error. Fix by: (1) adding runBdJSON helper that captures stderr and
includes it in error messages, (2) setting SilenceUsage on all convoy
subcommands to prevent usage dumps on operational errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
